{{Infobox character
| name = Keanos
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|tracking}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Hound|hound]]}}
| appears_in = Traveler's Gate
| introduced = [[House of Blades (novel)|House of Blades]]
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Keanos is a dog belonging to a woman who possesses the ability to levitate. The animal is a hound characterized by its loud, ringing barks that can be heard throughout the city of [[Elysia]]. Keanos wears golden armor and appears to have a close bond with [[Alin]], who is able to interact affectionately with the beast. The hound serves as a tracker, capable of following scents to locate specific individuals, such as people from [[Alin]]'s village. Despite being highly skilled at finding targets, Keanos has occasionally demonstrated confusion when a scent leads to an unexpected or incorrect location.}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Keanos is a massive hound distinguished by his bright blue eyes and thick white fur. Clad in glowing gold armor, the dog utilizes his tracking abilities to follow a specific scent. During his journey, he barks in competition with the city bells before successfully leading [[Alin]] to the house.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">6</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Keanos]] is a huge white-furred dog bound in gold armor with bright blue eyes.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c8">''House of Blades'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Keanos]] is a hound with glowing gold armor.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c17">''House of Blades'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Keanos]] is capable of tracking.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Keanos]] has a scent he is following.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Keanos]] is a character who barks in competition with the city bells.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c18">''House of Blades'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Keanos]] led [[Alin]] to the house.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c20">''House of Blades'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|“Yes,” he said. “Keanos found someone from our village inside that house.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c17" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
